message:
feat(core,share): add agent name mistake detection and shared detection infrastructure

Core crate:
- bocpd.rs: integrate Bayesian Online Change Point Detection for
  anomaly detection in agent naming patterns
- conformal.rs: add conformal prediction module for confidence-scored
  agent name validation
- disk.rs: extend disk persistence layer to support detection model
  state serialization
- lib.rs: wire new detection modules into core library exports
- models.rs: add data models for agent name mistake classification
  including program/model name confusion and unix username detection

Share crate:
- detection.rs (+54 lines): new agent detection module providing
  shared heuristics for identifying common agent naming mistakes
  (e.g., using program binary names or OS usernames as agent names)
- lib.rs (+298 lines): expand shared library with detection utilities,
  validation helpers, and cross-crate type definitions
- wizard.rs (+67 lines): add setup wizard utilities for guided agent
  identity configuration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
